'''Wrench''' was an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] and one of a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] left behind on [[Pengalan IV]] after their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] was shot down during a full scale [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Battle of Pengalan IV|retreat]].<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />

Abandoned with his fellow troopers and a Republic accountant named [[Joram Kithe]], they were on their own to figure out how to get off the desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. When Kithe awoke and revealed that he had been commissioned as a [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], he was placed in charge.<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />

Kithe was disturbed by the troopers' reliance on proper procedure, and tried to foster individuality in them. To that end, he gave the troopers nicknames. Wrench gained his nickname because he was the most mechanically skilled among the troopers.<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />

After making their way to [[Tur Lorkin]], the nearest village, and infiltrating a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] bay, [[Tooth (clone)|Tooth]] and Kithe realized that the village was in fact the site of the [[diamond boron missile]] manufacturing facility, not the factory which had been the site of the earlier trap.<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />

Determined to destroy it, Tooth faced Kithe and was willing to defy the man's orders to complete his mission. Impressed, Kithe relented. The troopers sabotaged the factory with Kithe's aid while Tooth stole a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] ship to draw the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] away from the starship bay, allowing Joram and the remaining troopers to escape. Wrench took command of a crate of missiles in the factory assault, using them to demolish the facility.<ref name="The Pengalan Tradeoff" />

He survived the mission, and would continue to serve with the other survivors.<ref name="League of Spies">''[[League of Spies]]''</ref>
